name: CAPSTONE 72, INC.
business: Capstone 72, Inc. is a vertically integrated real estate investment platform that acquires, renovates, and sells single-family homes, primarily in Ohio, and also assists buyers with property management after purchase.
sellsTo: U.S. investors (planned expansion to Los Angeles, San Francisco Bay Area)

exposures.sentence: Capstone 72 Properties LLC, our main operating subsidiary, is a U.S.-based, vertically integrated real estate investment platform specializing primarily in the acquisition, renovation, and sale of single-family homes (SFH).
We conduct our own research and development (R&D) and maintain an in-house engineering team dedicated to exploring the development of a proprietary AI-powered investment platform.
Our AI technology is still under development and may not perform as intended or achieve the expected business outcomes.

catalysts.event: Launch of AI-powered investment platform in stages
catalysts.sentence: It is expected to be launched in several stages through 2026.

catalysts.event: Enter new U.S. markets (Los Angeles, San Francisco Bay Area, others)
catalysts.sentence: with plans to enter Los Angeles, the San Francisco Bay Area, and other U.S. markets in 2026.
